title: Reimagined | Fresh Animations Patch
description: Makes Reimagined compatible with Fresh Animations!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0272f5431fb8c1c4c221b03d2ba52e08ee0b1f9.png)

[Want to support Reimagined? I've got a Ko-Fi!](https://ko-fi.com/reijvi)
![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

This is an addon for my [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) resource pack that is meant to make it's custom mob models compatible with Fresh Animations! This addon is meant to be above [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) in the load order and Fresh Animations itself above Reimagined!

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9146234e9de1571a3da47b089f1c262c18f9e127.png)

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

[![Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069297932811116564/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/rstmkrGeFJ)

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

[![Ad](https://i.gyazo.com/5a2618c30403aaceb78a5bceb2b8efd2.png)](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined)
Want to support Reimagined? For no extra cost, I get a part of the revenue via the purchases made through [this](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) link
